title: Mock interview: DSA round (45 min, 2 problems)
focus: Time-boxed mock — write code, talk through complexity, debrief.

items.label: Koko Eating Bananas
interviewQuestions: State your loop invariant precisely — what must be true on every iteration?
Why does the loop terminate, and how do you avoid infinite loops on the search-space update?
Walk through edge cases: empty array, target smaller than min, target larger than max, duplicates.

items.label: Mock 1: medium array/hashing problem (20 min)
interviewQuestions: Solve and explain time/space complexity in under 25 minutes.
Verbalize one optimization you skipped — and explain why it didn't make the cut for interview pacing.

items.label: Mock 2: medium tree/graph problem (20 min)
interviewQuestions: Solve and explain time/space complexity in under 25 minutes.
What edge cases (empty input, cycle, single node) did you cover before coding?

items.label: Self-debrief: communication, edge cases, complexity
interviewQuestions: What did you skip explaining that the interviewer would have asked?
Identify one moment where you went silent — what could you have said instead?
